sections.paragraph:
an unused root; Syriac ܟܪܰܟ to surround, also Syr. and Chald. to wrap around, to wrap up. This appears to be a secondary root from כרר, כרכר to surround, (whence כִּכָּר circuit, circle), formed by the rejection of one radical; compare שַׁרְשָׁה a chain, from שַׁרְשְׁרָה (Hebr. Gramm. p. 73).

Hence תַּכְרִיךְ a mantle; Syriac ܟܰܪܟܳܐ a fortress; compare כַּרְכְּמִישׁ, and-
